# GoTimer.org

> GoTimer is a free, browser-based timer platform for board games, fitness, photography, wellness, productivity, and cooking. No app download, no signup required — works in any modern browser at https://gotimer.org.

Last updated: 2026-04-20
Full documentation: https://gotimer.org/llms-full.txt

## Timer Strategies (10 engines)

- **Countdown Timer** (countdown): A simple countdown timer that counts down from a set duration.
- **Chess Clock** (chess-clock): A two-player chess clock where each player has their own time bank.
- **Round Timer** (round-timer): A round-based timer for sports and combat games with work and rest periods.
- **Interval Timer** (interval): A work/rest interval timer, perfect for Pomodoro technique, HIIT workouts, and timed study sessions.
- **Multi-Step Timer** (multi-step): A sequential timer that runs through multiple named steps, each with its own duration.
- **Ambient Timer** (ambient): A long-form ambient timer that counts up or down with optional interval notifications.
- **Calculator Timer** (calculator-timer): A timer that computes durations based on input values (e.g., reciprocity correction for film photography).
- **Multi-Timer** (multi-timer): Run multiple independent countdown timers simultaneously.
- **Turn Timer** (turn-timer): Per-player turn countdown for 2-8 players in board games and group activities.
- **Enlarger Timer** (enlarger): F-stop timing and test strip mode for darkroom printing.

## Categories (6)

- **🎲 Board Games** (4 presets): Countdown Timer, Chess Clock, Round Timer, Turn Timer
- **🎞️ Photography** (6 presets): Film Development Timer, Long Exposure Calculator, Stand Development Timer, Enlarger Timer, Cyanotype Timer, Photo Walk Timer
- **🏋️ Fitness** (5 presets): HIIT Timer, Tabata Timer, Stretching Timer, EMOM Timer, Rest Timer
- **🧘 Wellness** (4 presets): Meditation Timer, Breathing Timer, Sleep Timer, Fasting Timer
- **🎯 Productivity** (5 presets): Pomodoro Timer, Study Timer, ADHD Focus Timer, Classroom Timer, Presentation Timer
- **🍳 Kitchen** (4 presets): Cooking Timer, Egg Timer, Multi-Timer, Bread Proofing Timer

## MCP Integration

GoTimer provides an MCP server for AI assistants.

- **npm package**: gotimer-mcp
- **Claude Desktop config**:
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "gotimer": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "gotimer-mcp"],
      "env": {
        "GOTIMER_API_KEY": "your-api-key"
      }
    }
  }
}
```
- **Tools**: list_timer_types, list_timer_presets, list_public_challenges, get_leaderboard, create_challenge, join_challenge, create_timer, create_pomodoro, get_timer_url, get_embed_code

## Key URLs

- API base: https://gotimer.org/api/v1
- OpenAPI spec: https://gotimer.org/api/openapi.json
- Developer docs: https://gotimer.org/developers
- Sitemap: https://gotimer.org/sitemap.xml

### Strategy Setup Pages
- Countdown Timer: https://gotimer.org/countdown-setup
- Chess Clock: https://gotimer.org/chess-clock-setup
- Round Timer: https://gotimer.org/round-timer-setup

- 🎲 Board Games: https://gotimer.org/board-games
- 🎞️ Photography: https://gotimer.org/photography
- 🏋️ Fitness: https://gotimer.org/fitness
- 🧘 Wellness: https://gotimer.org/wellness
- 🎯 Productivity: https://gotimer.org/productivity
- 🍳 Kitchen: https://gotimer.org/kitchen
